channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jets QB Aaron Rodgers is off the injury report and fine to play Monday night vs. Bills
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers is off the New York Jets' injury report and will be back under center Monday night against the Buffalo Bills. The quarterback was a full participant Saturday after being limited Thursday and Friday while dealing with a sprained ankle.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a grand slam off Tarik Skubal and Cleveland beat the Detroit Tigers 7-3 on Saturday in Game 5 of their AL Division Series, moving the Guardians into another postseason matchup against the Yankees.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 7 Alabama overcomes botched onside recovery to beat South Carolina 27-25
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Alabama was able to hold off South Carolina 27-25 on Saturday with an interception after allowing the Gamecocks a chance at handing the Crimson Tide its second straight SEC loss by botching an onside-kick recovery before the game's final drive.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sydney Sweeney responds to Oregon mascot's flirty ‘College GameDay’ sign
item.description: Hollywood actress Sydney Sweeney has responded to the Oregon Ducks mascot's flirtation ahead of the team's big matchup against Ohio State Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: NFL wife Devon Mostert receives racist hate online for defending DeSantis against Harris
item.description: Devon Mostert praised Ron DeSantis' response to Hurricane Helene and Hurricane Milton making landfall in Florida back-to-back. Mostert received racist backlash from social media users.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Holding a Super Bowl outside the US is a possibility, NFL Commissioner Goodell says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The NFL's aggressive international growth plan could include holding a Super Bowl outside the United States for the first time, Commissioner Roger Goodell said Saturday. Goodell has shot down the idea in the past, but he told a fan forum in London that it's a possibility.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Zealand takes 2-0 lead over Britain in America’s Cup first-to-seven final
item.description: Emirates Team New Zealand have won the opening two races of the America’s Cup final against INEOS Britannia off Barcelona.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers Game 5: Who will advance to the NLCS?
item.description: PHOTOS: The San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will face off in Game 5 of the National League Division Series (NLDS) on Friday, Oct. 11 at Dodger Stadium. The winner of this game will advance to the NLCS, which starts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: MLB spring training facilities spared extensive damage from Hurricane Milton
item.description: Major League Baseball spring training facilities on Florida’s west coast appear to have been mostly spared major damage during Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Xfinity field shrinks as drivers prepare for new Roval challenge
item.description: Before Sunday's main event, the Xfinity Series will feature an elimination race that will trim the playoff field from 12 drivers to just eight.
item.dc:creator: Joey Ellis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries name team's first head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Twenty years after playing professional women’s basketball in San Jose, Natalie Nakase is returning to the Bay Area after being named Thursday as the Golden State Valkyries' first head coach.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres and Dodgers face off in game 1 of the NLDS
item.description: The San Diego Padres are continuing their postseason journey in game one of the NLDS against the Dodgers after defeating the Braves earlier this week in the NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Clayton Kershaw won't pitch for the Dodgers in playoffs after big toe injury fails to heal
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Clayton Kershaw, sidelined since late August with a toe injury, won’t pitch again this season for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
